name: Aditya Modi
summary: Experienced software engineer with a focus on artificial intelligence and data science, skilled in developing and optimizing applications and frameworks. Adept at building predictive models and integrating technologies to enhance data retrieval and analysis.

experience.title: Software Engineering Analyst
highlights: Developed a Text-to-SQL chatbot that translates natural language questions into executable SQL queries
Integrated Vanna OSS with a custom Dremio client, enabling dynamic retrieval of schema and sample data to ground model responses in real database context
Evaluated LLMs (Mistral & SQLCoder) to compare accuracy and performance across prompting strategies
Optimized RAG retrieval in ChromaDB to improve relevance filtering and reduce retrieval noise

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
highlights: Transformed live trade data received from Solace in XML format to JSON required for Veritas storage
Built a Spring Boot engine to poll for a trades USI every 10 minutes to store in an H2 database for compliance
Created a routing app to process and convert CME trades through an adapter, capturing all info Murex requires
Leveraged JUnit and Postman to test an upstream Spring Boot app, causing a 40% decrease in production issues

experience.company: Netflix Via the Rutgers MBS Internship Program
experience.title: Data Extern Team Lead
highlights: Developed a pipeline for Netflix data collection analyzing 10,000+ user reviews to uncover preferences and genre trends
Utilized VADER to analyze sentiment, identifying 70% positive feedback, guiding content curation decisions
Applied Seaborn and Scikit-learn to build a model predicting 5 years of Netflix content trained on historical data
Delivered an impactful presentation to 40+ people including mentors from Moody's and Goldman Sachs
